mapper.insert: INSERT INTO iot_device_property_record(tenant_id, product_key, device_name, property_identifier, property_value, trace_id, message_id, topic, device_timestamp, payload, is_delete, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{productKey}, #{deviceName}, #{propertyIdentifier}, #{propertyValue}, #{traceId}, #{messageId}, #{topic}, #{deviceTimestamp}, #{payload}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

INSERT INTO iot_device_event_record(tenant_id, product_key, device_name, event_name, trace_id, message_id, topic, device_timestamp, payload, is_delete, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{productKey}, #{deviceName}, #{eventName}, #{traceId}, #{messageId}, #{topic}, #{deviceTimestamp}, #{payload}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

INSERT INTO iot_device_service_record(tenant_id, product_key, device_name, service_name, direction, trace_id, message_id, topic, device_timestamp, payload, is_delete, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{productKey}, #{deviceName}, #{serviceName}, #{direction}, #{traceId}, #{messageId}, #{topic}, #{deviceTimestamp}, #{payload}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
